case_title: DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE VS GUERRERO, FELIPE J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, FELIPE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
